timeline.label: Polaris Forge 3: 300 MW / ~$7.5B base lease with same IG hyperscaler as Delta Forge; portfolio reaches ~1.2 GW contracted / ~$31B base revenue.
FQ3 FY2026: revenue $126.6M (+139% YoY); Cloud Services classified held-for-sale; equity $1.58B.
Co-founder Jason Zhang appointed President (8-K cluster).
FY2025 10-K: revenue $144.2M; long-term debt $869.5M; heavy capex $681.6M; equity $497.7M.
Fiscal year-end; pivot from crypto hosting to AI/HPC data-center lease model largely complete.
Multiple 424B5 offerings fund campus construction (S-3/424B5 series in download manifest).
Public listing / rebrand to Applied Digital; early crypto data-center operations.

industry.structure: AI/HPC data-center landlords compete for hyperscaler take-or-pay leases; power and grid access are the scarce inputs; few scaled operators with multi-GW pipelines.
industry.share_shift: Applied Digital is gaining share via Polaris Forge and Delta Forge campuses with investment-grade hyperscalers; legacy crypto hosting is exited (Cloud held-for-sale).
industry.trend: Hyperscaler capex and GPU density drive demand for dedicated power campuses; construction financing and tenant concentration remain industry-wide risks.
